spec_match.rationale: The page now calls PaymentRequest.getSecurePaymentConfirmationCapabilities() when exposed, falls back through feature detection, and maps that result into the checkout decision simulator.

interactive.rationale: The real probe, apply-to-simulator action, scenario selector, multi-step checkout, payment method selection, and fallback form all change visible state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now links directly to the checkout-simulator slug and describes the same capability-gated checkout path.

edge_cases.rationale: Page references 6 edge case / failure / fallback hits and the control surface has room to exercise distinct branches, so the happy path is not the only one shown.

references.rationale: The see-also section includes chromestatus.com/feature/4727235745546240 and the SPC capabilities spec section.

design_system.rationale: All colours come via 110 CSS-variable references, no raw hex, no button background override without a colour override, and not a static-card pattern.

summary: Major and moderate findings resolved: the checkout simulator now includes the required ChromeStatus reference, performs a real PaymentRequest capability probe behind feature detection, fixes the feature-index slug link, and keeps rich fallback scenarios.
